root_cause: Production returned darren_strategy_chat_model_request_failed. The route had a single model request path with no retry to the prior stable model when a Darren-specific trial model or provider request failed.
primary_model: DARREN_STRATEGY_CHAT_MODEL when set and allowlisted; recommended value gpt-5.5

model_selection_behavior.env_missing_behavior: use stable fallback model as primary
model_selection_behavior.env_invalid_behavior: use stable fallback model as primary
model_selection_behavior.primary_failure_behavior: retry once with stable fallback model

local_smoke_tests.reason: Live local route smoke requires local runtime secrets and a server; no deploy was requested.

validation_results.npm_run_build: passed with existing Vite large chunk warning
validation_results.static_privacy_claim_scan: passed; no matches in changed files

vercel_env_required.production_recommendation: Set DARREN_STRATEGY_CHAT_MODEL=gpt-5.5 for the MORE MindMap project only.

production_readiness_verdict: Code is ready for validation and deploy after checks pass. Production remains on old behavior until deployed.
limits: Fallback implementation can be verified statically before deploy; runtime fallback can be verified after deploy or with local runtime env vars.
The route still depends on OPENAI_API_KEY being configured.
